name: buck-mason-stylist-skill
description: Personal shopping skill for Buck Mason — stock checks, wardrobe gap analysis, AI try-on lookbooks (gpt-image-2), and one-shot cart + checkout (browser link or fully agent-driven via MPP + stripe/link-cli). Talks to the pima.io MCP at /mcp/buckmason/*.

OPENAI_API_KEY.conditional: Premium-tier lookbook generation only — workflow #3's gpt-image-2 try-on imagery. Stock checks, wardrobe gap analysis, recommend, cart, MPP checkout, order tracking, and the Editorial-tier and Minimum-tier lookbooks ALL work without it. The skill degrades gracefully (Premium → Editorial → Minimum) per references/headless-mode.md § "Recurring weekly newsletter" and SKILL.md workflow #3.
OPENAI_API_KEY.purpose: OpenAI /v1/images/edits with model gpt-image-2 for AI try-on imagery. Optional capability, not a hard prereq.

@stripe/link-cli.notes: Install only from the @stripe scope on npm. Pin to a reviewed version in production deployments. The skill never bundles or vendors this CLI.

filesystem.purpose: Cross-session wishlist + purchase history. Appended after html-cart handoff selections and successful MPP orders so the agent has continuity across sessions. JSONL, append-only; contains slug + size + qty + lookbook_id + order_id + timestamps. No card data, no shipping address, no email.
